highlights.description: DataFrame library for Go with XLSX export support

added.description: Core `Frame` type for tabular data with named columns
Core `Column` type with automatic type inference (string, int64, float64, bool, time)
Column formatting with Excel number formats (currency, percent, date, etc.)
XLSX export via `WriteXLSX()` for Frame and FrameSet
Column width support for Excel output

tests.description: XLSX export tests for single frame and multi-sheet workbooks

documentation.description: README with installation, quick start, and API overview
PRD with product requirements and 6-phase roadmap

build.description: Initial Go module setup with excelize dependency
